title: Investors secure high-stakes Mareva injunction
content:
## Investors secure high-stakes Mareva injunction
On November 27, 2025, we represented a group of investors in securing a high-stakes Mareva injunction (asset freezing order) freezing approximately US$7 million in assets allegedly obtained through fraud.
McCarthy Tétrault assisted a group of investors with a team that included Connor Bildfell, Alex Cocks, and Katherine Griffin (Litigation).
